Masala Dosa (WPRM modern template)

Ingredients

  • 2 cups parboiled rice
  • ½ cup urad dal
  • 1 tsp fine salt
  • 2 tbsp oil

Instructions

  • Rinse rice and dal separately, then soak both for four to six hours.
  • Drain and grind to a smooth batter, adding water as needed.
  • Stir in salt and ferment overnight until bubbly.
  • Heat a flat tawa, spread batter thin, drizzle oil, and cook until crisp.
  • Fold with potato masala and serve hot with chutney.
